# RovoAPI - AI API Gateway

## Overview
RovoAPI is an enterprise-grade AI API gateway platform designed for quantitative traders and automation teams. It provides intelligent routing, multi-model access, and real-time analytics through a unified interface.

## Website
- **URL**: https://rovoapi.com
- **Support Email**: support@rovoapi.com

## Core Models

### rovo-turbo
- Fast, cost-effective model for standard tasks
- Available on all plans
- Optimized for quick responses

### rovo-quantum
- Advanced model for complex reasoning tasks
- Available on Pro and Pro Annual plans
- Higher capability for demanding workloads

## Features

1. **Multi-Model Access**: Single API endpoint to access multiple AI models
2. **Intelligent Routing**: Automatic model selection based on task requirements
3. **OpenAI Compatible**: Drop-in replacement for OpenAI API with zero code changes
4. **Real-time Analytics**: Monitor usage, costs, and performance metrics
5. **Usage Management**: Track and control API consumption

## API Endpoints

- **API Base URL**: https://api.rovoapi.com
- **Documentation**: https://api.rovoapi.com/doc
- **Dashboard**: https://api.rovoapi.com

## Pricing Plans

### Starter (Free)
- 20 requests/day
- rovo-turbo model
- Standard routing
- Basic analytics

### Pro ($9.9/month)
- 1,000 requests/day
- All models (rovo-turbo & rovo-quantum)
- Priority routing
- Advanced analytics
- Email support
- Early Access pricing locked

### Pro Annual ($99/year)
- Everything in Pro
- Lock early access price forever
- Priority support
- Early access to new models
- Save 58% vs monthly

## Target Audience
- Quantitative traders
- Automation teams
- Developers building AI-powered applications
- Businesses requiring reliable AI API access

## Technology
- OpenAI-compatible API interface
- Intelligent routing engine
- Real-time usage tracking
- Secure authentication

## Legal

### Privacy Policy
RovoAPI collects minimal data (email, usage data) for service provision. API logs are retained for 90 days. No data is sold to third parties. Industry-standard encryption is used for data protection.

### Terms of Service
The service is provided "as is." Users must comply with applicable laws, avoid abuse, and not resell API access. Pro plan fees are non-refundable except as required by law.

## Contact
- Email: support@rovoapi.com
